title: Vacancy for Teacher at Manipal University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Manipal University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!
